title: Bassia londesia
taxonomy: Bassia londesia is classified within the family Amaranthaceae, commonly known as the amaranth family. This classification places Bassia londesia among other flowering plants that share similar characteristics. The genus Bassia is a group of plants that have been traditionally classified as a part of the Caryophyllales order. The specific classification of Bassia londesia may vary depending on the taxonomic system used.
